title: PeaToons - Shader RP
description: This makes your game look like it has shaders with NO fps drop.
body:
![New Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e41ebb5e5e590f7142ca7700fa728847cbd0183.png)


PeaToons Resource Pack
A lightweight visual enhancement pack that gives shader‑like visuals with zero FPS loss and no mods required. The goal is a vibrant, slightly cartoony look inspired by ReShaded.

✨**Features**
- Shader‑like visuals without installing any shaders

- No performance drop — works smoothly on all setups

- Vibrant, cartoony style across all dimensions

- ReShaded‑inspired design

![Cherry Blossom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/051b614f14c422694c57d8fbc60727a52fa7840b_0.webp)


**Credits:** Huge thanks to [Dr7](https://modrinth.com/user/DR7) for inspiration and file‑structure guidance. Also many thanks to [DelofJ](https://modrinth.com/user/DelofJ) for reference to the night sky fog and such.

⚠️**Compatibility**

❌ Not compatible with Iris

❌ Not compatible with Sodium

❌ Not compatible with Sodium Core Shader Support Mod

📌 Check version descriptions before downloading to ensure you get the correct one

🎥 Showcase & Info

Full video available in the Modrinth Discord Showcase

Questions or want to watch the video?

👉 https://discord.com/channels/734077874708938864/1491066619185856672
